title: The Tourney
content:
Ralph would fight in Edithï¿½s sight,
For Ralph was Edithï¿½s lover,
Ralph went down like a fire to the fight,
Struck to the left and struck to the right,
Rollï¿½d them over and over.
ï¿½Gallant Sir Ralph,ï¿½ said the king.

Casques were crackï¿½d and hauberks hackï¿½d,
Lances snapt in sunder,
Rang the stroke, and sprang the blood,
Knights were thwackï¿½d and riven, and hewï¿½d
Like broad oaks with thunder.
ï¿½O what an arm,ï¿½ said the king.

Edith bowï¿½d her stately head,
Saw them lie confounded,
Edith Montfort bowï¿½d her head,
Crownï¿½d her knightï¿½s, and flushï¿½d as red
As poppies when she crownï¿½d it.
ï¿½Take her Sir Ralph,ï¿½ said the king.
meaning:
Alfred Lord Tennyson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Tourney"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
